description: A compact zippered pouch for storing small items.  In addition to mounting onto PALS webbing, it can mount onto the EUD interface.  Has two external loops for holding onto things like pens, small batteries, and glowsticks.

variants.description: A compact pouch for holding onto small items in the field.  In addition to PALS, this pouch can mount onto the EUD interface, making it useful on aftermarket plate carriers and chest rigs.  Two external loops can hold onto longer, smaller objects, such as pens and glowsticks.  <variant:multicam>

Two external loops can hold onto longer, smaller objects, such as pens and glowsticks.  <variant:multicam_black>

notes: trim assumes the width accounts for the EUD adapter at the back, and not just the pouch itself

pocket_data.//min_item_volume: roughly the size of an AA battery
pocket_data.//min_item_length: slightly shorter than 1/3 of the length of a 6-inch glowstick, as advertised in source
pocket_data.//max_item_length: roughly the horizontal length of the pouch
